title: nepeta atlantica
intro: Nepeta atlantica, also known as Catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its grey-green foliage and spikes of blue or white flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Nepeta atlantica include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Nepeta atlantica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and soothe skin irritations.
